title: Foundation Practice
overview: Volume 1–2 foundation spine: role and coordinated clinic (Volume 1 Week 1), hair and scalp literacy (Week 3), presentation safety (Week 4), structured consultation capture (Volume 2 Week 5), and screening support with escalation (Week 6).

title: Advanced Consultation Practice
overview: Volume 1–3 advanced spine: ethics and consent support (Volume 1 Week 2), trust-based communication (Volume 2 Week 7), non-surgical then surgical pathway education within scope (Week 8 → bridge module 9), then Volume 3 Week 9 documentation, photography, and doctor handover.

title: Leadership and Clinical Coordination
overview: Volume 3 diploma spine: pre-op coordination (Week 10), post-op follow-up and escalation (Week 11), difficult and high-risk encounters (Week 11 continued), QA and systems leadership (Week 12), and final competency integration with faculty review.
